item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 18, 2026
item.description: An unconventional family's dark secrets, a bookshop sanctuary, a grumpy/sunshine rom-dram set in the 1950s, and more of today's book deals.

item.title: Sylvia Plath, Godly Chaos, and More New YA Book Releases for February 18, 2026
item.description: Chaotic gods, a story inspired by the real Sylvia Plath, love on ice, and more of this week's new YA book releases.

item.title: Books for Avid Toni Morrison Fans
item.description: In the last few years, a host of writers and scholars have been putting out stunning volumes about Morrison’s work—here are a few of our favorites.

item.title: Book Recommendations for Fans of His & Hers
item.description: Plus, murder mysteries with family drama, Good Morning America picks a thriller for their February book club selection, and more.

item.title: Why Graphic Nonfiction Matters
item.description: If you’re looking for a place to start with graphic nonfiction, here are eight titles that span across a range of topics and art styles.
